pt-br: Define B, T, C e V como contrato base para acompanhar cada tensor no pipeline.
Cria idx e targets em torch.long para manter semantica discreta de IDs e classes.
Simula hidden e logits em float32, representando a parte continua do modelo.
Mostra cast intencional (long -> float -> long) para tornar a troca de papel numerico explicita.
Fecha com leitura operacional de dtype, shape e device em cada etapa.
en-us: Defines B, T, C, and V as the base contract to track tensors across the pipeline.
Builds idx and targets in torch.long to preserve discrete ID/class semantics.
Simulates hidden and logits in float32, representing the model's continuous side.
Shows intentional casting (long -> float -> long) to make numeric role changes explicit.
Ends with an operational readout of dtype, shape, and device at each stage.
